events.text: Substitution, South Africa. Thalente Mbatha replaces Relebohile Mofokeng.
Nathan Saliba (Canada) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Canada. Niko Sigur replaces Nathan Saliba.
Substitution, Canada. Luc De Fougerolles replaces Moïse Bombito.
Niko Sigur (Canada) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Canada. Promise David replaces Tani Oluwaseyi.
Substitution, Canada. Jacob Shaffelburg replaces Liam Millar.
Substitution, Canada. Alphonso Davies replaces Tajon Buchanan.
Substitution, South Africa. Iqraam Rayners replaces Evidence Makgopa.
Substitution, South Africa. Tshepang Moremi replaces Thapelo Maseko.
Goal! South Africa 0, Canada 1. Stephen Eustaquio (Canada) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner.
